Working days

MINE BNB is a unique mining simulator that allows you to earn from 200% to 450% profit in 30 days. You can earn from anywhere, our site is optimized for any device.

You do not need to stay on the site, the mining process takes place even in your absence. All you need to do to start earning is to make a deposit of 0.0045 .

Do not miss the opportunity to earn on our referral program. We pay 7-2-1% of the deposit of each of your referrals.

You can use any advertising methods. You can also use our banner to promote your referral link.

Get rewarded for reviews on YouTube, Facebook, Telegram, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter or on your personal blog.
